verified_paired_run.timezone_note: Captured on maintainer machine; reproduce with run_chess_compare.ps1 when API capacity allows.
verified_paired_run.prerequisites: npx skills add mattbaconz/signal -y -g; same prompt.txt in both cwd runs

compare.interpretation: Assistant reply was much shorter with SIGNAL project GEMINI.md (~88% fewer characters vs this baseline run). stats.models.*.tokens.total was higher in the SIGNAL cwd mainly because prompt/input tokens increased (~8009 vs ~7555) from GEMINI.md + skill context — expected single-turn tradeoff. For cumulative session savings (especially history), use benchmark/long-session/.
